title: nephrodium marginale var. elegans
intro: Nephrodium marginale var. elegans is a variety of the Nephrodium marginale plant, also known as the Rattlesnake Fern, a type of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant's extracts have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and diuretic properties. Nephrodium marginale var. elegans can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
